name: pump_fade_simple_meme
description: pump_fade_simple (exact baseline logic) on meme/micro-cap alts. Sweeps key params around baseline optimum.
_diagnosis: Baseline (commit e341055e, pump_fade_v4c_240d): PF=1.883, 19 trades, DD=3.77%, WR=42.1%.
Baseline code = 190-line strategies/pump_fade.py (BASE mode only, no exhaustion filter,
no confirm_bars, no RSI override, single-bar reversal: c<EMA9 AND c<prev_close).
Baseline edge symbols: MYXUSDT (5), AZTECUSDT (5), ENSOUSDT (4), RIVERUSDT (3) = micro-cap memes.
pump_fade_simple.py = exact replica of baseline code, renamed class to avoid archive collision.
Grid: 5 params × 3 levels = 243 combos × 2 symbol baskets = 486 combos.
PF_ENTRY_MAX_DROP_PCT is hardcoded 0.08 in baseline — not in this strategy.
